TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Juan_Orlando_HernΟΓndez, title = Juan_Orlando_HernΟΓndez, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Juan_Orlando_HernΟΓndez} }

S.FORM: I 1968 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 28 a romi'ad masofoc ci Juan Orlando HernΟΓndez , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Honduras anini i ci Juan Orlando HernΟΓndez, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 27 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miΡß…ô Πa saka ** fo~u…Ψa…§~…° saka ** a ro~umi Γa…§~…° maso~ufo~u Π Πi *o~u~uan o~ur…Ψan…§~…°o~u Ρß…ôrn*n…§~…°…ô* , ma…Ψamiko~umo~u…§~…°aj a tam…§~…°aw. o~u sawara Γan no~u kitakit no~u Ρßo~un…§~…°o~u~uras anini i Πi *o~u~uan o~ur…Ψan…§~…°o~u Ρß…ôrn*n…§~…°…ô*, patir…ô≈΄an a ro~umi Γa…§~…° i **** a miΡß…ô Πa saka * fo~u…Ψa…§~…° saka ** a ro~umi Γa…§~…°.
S.FORM: I 1968 a miheca saka 10 folad saka 28 a romi'ad masofoc ci Juan Orlando HernΟΓndez , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Honduras anini i ci Juan Orlando HernΟΓndez, patirengan a romi'ad i 2014 a miheca saka 1 folad saka 27 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a miΡß…ô Πa saka ** fo~u…Ψa…§~…° saka ** a ro~umi Γa…§~…° maso~ufo~u Π Πi *o~u~uan o~ur…Ψan…§~…°o~u Ρß…ôrn*n…§~…°…ô* , ma…Ψamiko~umo~u…§~…°aj a tam…§~…°aw. o~u sawara Γan no~u kitakit no~u Ρßo~un…§~…°o~u~uras anini i Πi *o~u~uan o~ur…Ψan…§~…°o~u Ρß…ôrn*n…§~…°…ô*, patir…ô≈΄an a ro~umi Γa…§~…° i **** a miΡß…ô Πa saka * fo~u…Ψa…§~…° saka ** a ro~umi Γa…§~…°.
